text: Pathways leading to apoptosis, or single cell death, have traditionally been studied as both independent and simultaneous from pathways leading to necrosis, or tissue-wide cell death, with both overlap and distinct mechanisms (Elmore 2007). For the purposes of this key event relationship, we are characterizing widespread cell-death due to inflammation (Bock and Riley 2022), while acknowledging that cell death can be caused by multiple stressors, and need not include inflammation.
